# Selfhost Compose Wizard

Canonical: https://github.com/shahboura/selfhost-compose-wizard
Repository: https://github.com/shahboura/selfhost-compose-wizard

Summary:
Selfhost Compose Wizard is a privacy-first web app that generates docker-compose.yaml and .env files for self-hosted services.

Key capabilities:
- Service template selection with category filters
- Guided environment variable editing with defaults
- Service-specific references and risk warnings
- Bundle export as docker-compose.yaml + .env
- In-browser processing (no server-side form processing)

Primary docs:
- README: https://github.com/shahboura/selfhost-compose-wizard#readme

Topics:
- homelab
- self-hosting
- docker-compose
- privacy-first
